name: Universal AI Skill Engine

skillPlanner.description: Keyword→tool RegExp matching. Selects a subset of relevant tools per user request, reducing token usage. Zero cost (no AI call needed to plan).
skillPlanner.approach: RegExp matching on user message → select tool subset → Claude gets fewer tokens in tool context

contextCompressor.description: Recursively strips secrets and summarizes large data before sending to Claude.
contextCompressor.output: compressionRatio, originalChars, compressedChars stored in AiSkillExecution

tokenBudgetManager.description: Per-request token estimation and monthly quota guard.

executionGraph.description: Tracks status of each tool call within a request: pending → running → success | error | proposed.

toolRegistryService.description: DB-first tool lookup with code fallback. Supports filters by category and module.
toolRegistryService.approach: DB (ai_tool_registry) → fallback to TOOL_REGISTRY in code if DB not migrated

capabilityRegistry.description: Maps business capabilities to tools and providers. 8 capabilities seeded.

skillEngineOrchestrator.description: Orchestrates plan → compress → budget → returns enriched params. Audit logging to AiSkillExecution.

changes: Step 5: prepareSkillExecution() called before Claude API call
budget reject → fallback to Reno Brain
budget fallback → fallback to Reno Brain (quota exceeded)
filterToolDefinitions() reduces tool context to planned tools
ExecutionGraph wired: addNode + markRunning + markSuccess/markError per tool call
Step 9: logSkillExecution() called after every Claude call (success and error paths)

endpoints.description: List all tools, filter by category/module
List all capabilities, filter by category
Execution stats for tenant (last N days)

securityChecks.claudeNeverExposesSecrets: Context compressor strips secrets before any AI call
securityChecks.claudeNeverExecutesCriticalWithoutApprov: All write actions create BrainAction or AiExecProposal
securityChecks.everyToolExecutionAudited: ClaudeToolCall + AiSkillExecution both written on every call

tokenOptimization.skillPlannerSavings: Keyword matching selects relevant tool subset — Claude gets 1-4 tools instead of all 13
tokenOptimization.contextCompressionSavings: Business data compressed before injection into prompts
tokenOptimization.budgetGuard: Requests exceeding 32K estimated tokens rejected or compressed before API call

mandatoryRule: STOPPED. Do not start Phase 35 until Phase 34 is reviewed and approved by ChatGPT.
